title: Function Types: Plain vs. One-to-One (Injective)
description: A visual comparison of a general function (plain) and a one-to-one (injective) function, showing the mapping of elements from a domain set to a codomain set.
elements: Elements in Set A (a1, a2, a3)
Elements in Set B (b1, b2, b3, b4)
relationships: Plain Function: Multiple inputs can map to the same output (e.g., a1->b1, a2->b1)
One-to-One Function: Each input maps to a unique output (e.g., a1->b2, a2->b3, a3->b4); no output is shared
